tools.name: create_estimates
tools.description:
## Lugg Moving Quotes

Get instant price quotes for on-demand moving, delivery, and hauling services.

---

### What it returns
- Price estimates for available vehicle options with crew size and cargo dimensions
- Route details including distance and estimated duration
- Direct booking links for each option

---

### Inputs
- **`origin` (required)** - Pickup location (address, landmark, business name, or zip code)
- **`destination` (required)** - Drop-off location (address, landmark, business name, or zip code)
- **`move_size` (optional)** - Size hint: small, medium, large, xl

---

### Key Rules & Constraints
- Service availability varies by region
- Pricing may be fixed or variable depending on location type
- Same-day and scheduled bookings available
